title: The Gallant Blade
writer: Walter Ferris, Morton Grant, Wilfrid H. Pettitt
actors: Larry Parks, Marguerite Chapman, Victor Jory
plot: 1648. French people are relieved: the Thirty Years War is over and they will be able to live in peace. This feeling is shared by General Cadeau, the hero of the war, and his loyal aide, Lieutenant David Picard. But not at all by M...
